APPEARANCES:
Jeanette N. Little, Esq. of MICHAEL, MAGUIRE & ASSOC. 837-3600, for defendants
Golden Gate Christian Reformed Church and United Artists Theatre Circuit, Inc.,
moving for summary judgment
Jonathan M. Rutledge, Esq., 362-8600, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE
REFORMED CHURCH's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT -- Granted. No triable issue of fact
re: causation. Plaintiff's oral request for the Court to issue written ruling was
denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
